name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem you are trying to solve, not just the solution. A clear problem statement helps evaluate whether the feature fits the direction of the project. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? Include a rough API design if you have one. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about and why did you rule them out? -->

## Would you be willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a pull request for this.
- [ ] No, I am just suggesting it.
